title: Untitled Adventures
description: Untitled Adventures is a modpack around chillaxing and having a fun time, with a sprinkle of tech mixed in. For the Minecraft PPN server.
body:
![A minecraft styled logo saying "untitled adventures"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de9d16569d492c762d54ec6e61ac1dbc7edc5552.png)


Our server owner is now cancer free🎉 !  While this doesn't mark the end of the battle, we're releasing a new server as a celebration:
Untitled Adventures!
Untitled Adventures will be a mostly chillax pack with some neat tech mods thrown in! And while you may miss capitalist, worry not! This is actually our test pack for to try out new mods for capitalist!

We're glad you can join us! You'll see all the factories you can build, and some of the cool new postal systems added by create 6.0!

In this kitchen-sink pack the world is your sandbox! All you need to do is shape it.

![Discord Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15652362bb920cf6d6bbd5ba816f5c8c0d7ee2f4.png)
